heroTitle: Manage Your Appointments via <0>WhatsApp</0>, Focus on Your Business
heroSubtitle: AI-powered appointment assistant for beauty centers, hairdressers, and spa salons, 24/7
sectorsTitle: Solutions for <0>Every Sector</0> That Needs Appointment Management
sectorsSubtitle: Watch sample demos for healthcare, beauty, education, and more.
featuresSubtitle: RandevuBot is designed to increase your business efficiency.
feature1Desc:
Your customers don't need to wait for business hours to book appointments. 
 Your assistant manages your appointments 24/7, even when your business is closed.
feature2Desc: Understands and responds in whatever language your customers write in.
feature3Desc: Prevent forgetfulness by automatically sending reminder messages to your customers before appointments.
feature4Desc:
View, manage, and edit all your appointments from a single panel. 
 Easily track customer information and history.
feature5Desc:
Appointments can be created for multiple experts simultaneously. 
 Separate working hours and leave calendars can be defined for each expert. 
 Customers can book with their preferred expert or the assistant directs them to the most suitable one.
feature6Desc: Weekly and monthly occupancy rates are automatically calculated for each expert appointment calendar. Performance and efficiency data is always at your fingertips to further improve your business.
pricingSubtitle: Choose one of our flexible plans according to your business size and needs.
copyright: © 2025 MT AI Systems LTD. All rights reserved.
heroTag: WhatsApp Appointment System for Beauty Salons
footerDesc: WhatsApp-integrated appointment system for beauty centers, massage salons, and hair salons.
problemSubtitle: Are you struggling with these issues?
problem1Desc: Customers want to book appointments in the evenings or weekends, but you can't answer the phone.
problem2Desc: Last-minute cancellations and no-shows are hurting your revenue and schedule.
problem3Desc: Tracking daily income and expenses and preparing monthly reports takes up valuable time.
beautyFeature1Desc: Customers can book appointments any time, even in the middle of the night.
beautyFeature2Desc: WhatsApp reminders 24h and 1h before appointments. No-show rates drop dramatically.
beautyFeature3Desc: Daily cash register, income-expense tracking, and monthly reports all in one screen.
beautyFeature4Desc: Separate calendar, working hours, and leave management for each expert.
beautyFeature5Desc: Customer history, preferences, and feedback in one panel.
beautyFeature6Desc: TR, EN, RU — The assistant automatically detects your customer's language.
pricingTrialNote: All plans start with a 14-day free trial. No credit card required.
pricingAllPlansNote: All plans include WhatsApp integration, automatic reminders, and accounting module.
demoPoint1: Automatically responds to every WhatsApp message
demoPoint2: Finds the right time, creates the booking, confirms it
demoPoint3: Sends reminder messages before the appointment
testimonial1Text: Thanks to RandevuBot, I no longer wait by the phone. Customers book themselves and we focus on our work.
testimonial2Text: The reminder feature dramatically reduced our no-show rate. We're very happy.
testimonial3Text: The accounting module was exactly what I needed. I can now easily track daily cash flow.
faqLanding1Q: Can I use it without WhatsApp?
faqLanding1A: No, RandevuBot works through WhatsApp. You just need to connect your account using a QR code, which takes only a few minutes.
faqLanding2Q: How many experts can I add?
faqLanding2A: Starter plan: 1 expert, Salon plan: 3 experts, Premium plan: 6 experts.
faqLanding3A: If you don't upgrade to a paid plan after the trial, your service will be paused. Your data is protected for 30 days.
faqLanding4A: Yes, all data is stored encrypted on secure servers. GDPR compliant.
faqLanding5A: Turkish, English, and Russian are supported. The assistant automatically detects your customer's language.
faqLanding6Q: Is the accounting module a full accounting program?
faqLanding6A: No, it includes daily cash register, income-expense tracking, and monthly reporting. Sufficient for small businesses.
ctaSubtitle: See the difference in 14 days. No credit card required.
demoDisclaimer: This is an automated demo showcasing RandevuBot's capabilities.
lawOfficeUser1: Hello, I would like to make an appointment to meet with a lawyer.
lawOfficeBot1:
Hello, I am the appointment assistant of MT Law Office.😊
 I need to get some information to arrange the most suitable lawyer and time for you.
 What subject would you like to discuss?
 (Divorce, labor law, criminal law, etc.)
lawOfficeBot2: I understand. Atty. Selin Kara will be suitable for labor law. Which day works for you?
lawOfficeBot3: For tomorrow (October 29, 2025), 13:00 and 16:00 are available. Which do you prefer?
lawOfficeBot4: May I have your first and last name for the appointment record?
lawOfficeBot5:
Thank you Ms. Demet.😊

 📅 Date: October 29, 2025
 ⏰ Time: 16:00
 ⚖️ Attorney: Atty. Selin Kara
 📍 MT Law Office – Meeting Room 1
 📌 Subject: Labor Law
 Do you confirm that I should create your appointment with this information?
lawOfficeBot6:
✅ Your appointment has been created!

 📅 Date: October 29, 2025
 ⏰ Time: 16:00
 ⚖️ Atty. Selin Kara – Labor Law
 📍 MT Law Office – Meeting Room 1

 📝 If you have any change or cancellation request regarding the appointment, you can contact me here again.
 See you later 😊
